crisisRegionInternationalUs.desc: Expandable region group header on the Crisis Lines screen for international and United States helplines.

crisisRegionUkIreland.desc: Expandable region group header on the Crisis Lines screen for United Kingdom and Ireland helplines.

crisisRegionSouthAfrica.desc: Expandable region group header on the Crisis Lines screen for South African helplines.

crisisRegionAustralia.desc: Expandable region group header on the Crisis Lines screen for Australian helplines.

crisisRegionCanada.desc: Expandable region group header on the Crisis Lines screen for Canadian helplines.

crisisRegionNewZealand.desc: Expandable region group header on the Crisis Lines screen for New Zealand helplines.

crisisRegionEurope.desc: Expandable region group header on the Crisis Lines screen for European helplines.

crisisHours247.desc: Availability badge on a crisis line meaning the line is open 24 hours a day, every day.

crisisHoursBusiness.desc: Availability badge on a crisis line meaning it is reachable only during normal business hours.

crisisHoursOffice.desc: Availability badge on a crisis line meaning it is reachable only during office hours.

crisisHoursMonFri.desc: Availability badge on a crisis line: open Monday to Friday, 9am to 8pm.

crisisLine988Name.desc: Name of the US '988 Suicide & Crisis Lifeline' helpline. '988' is the dial code.

crisisLine988Desc.en: US mental health & substance use crisis — call or text
crisisLine988Desc.desc: One-line description of the US 988 Suicide & Crisis Lifeline.

crisisLineSamhsaName.desc: Name of the US SAMHSA (Substance Abuse and Mental Health Services Administration) helpline. SAMHSA is a proper name; keep it.

crisisLineSamhsaDesc.desc: One-line description of the SAMHSA helpline.

crisisLineCrisisTextName.desc: Name of the US 'Crisis Text Line' SMS support service.

crisisLineCrisisTextNumber.desc: Instruction shown in place of a phone number for the Crisis Text Line: text the word HOME to the shortcode 741741. Keep 'HOME' and '741741' unchanged.

crisisLineCrisisTextDesc.desc: One-line description of the Crisis Text Line.

crisisLineAaGeneralName.desc: Name of the Alcoholics Anonymous (AA) general service line (US). 'AA' is an abbreviation for Alcoholics Anonymous.

crisisLineAaGeneralDesc.desc: One-line description of the AA General Service line.

crisisLineSmartUsName.desc: Name of the SMART Recovery support organisation (US). SMART Recovery is a proper name; keep it.

crisisLineSmartUsDesc.desc: One-line description of the SMART Recovery support line (US).

crisisLineAaUkName.desc: Name of the Alcoholics Anonymous helpline for the United Kingdom.

crisisLineAaUkDesc.desc: One-line description of the AA United Kingdom helpline.

crisisLineDrinklineName.desc: Name of the UK 'Drinkline' national alcohol helpline. Drinkline is a proper name; keep it.

crisisLineDrinklineDesc.desc: One-line description of the Drinkline helpline.

crisisLineSamaritansName.desc: Name of the UK/Ireland 'Samaritans' emotional support charity. Proper name; keep it.

crisisLineSamaritansDesc.desc: One-line description of the Samaritans helpline.

crisisLineFrankName.desc: Name of the UK 'Frank' drug and alcohol helpline. Proper name; keep it.

crisisLineFrankDesc.desc: One-line description of the Frank helpline.

crisisLineAaIrelandName.desc: Name of the Alcoholics Anonymous helpline for Ireland.

crisisLineAaIrelandDesc.desc: One-line description of the AA Ireland helpline.

crisisLineSadagSuicideName.desc: Name of the South African SADAG suicide crisis helpline.

crisisLineSadagSuicideDesc.desc: One-line description of the SADAG suicide crisis line. SADAG is a proper-name acronym; keep it.

crisisLineSadagSubstanceName.desc: Name of the SADAG substance-abuse helpline (South Africa).

crisisLineSadagSubstanceDesc.en: South African Depression and Anxiety Group
crisisLineSadagSubstanceDesc.desc: Full name of SADAG, shown as the description of its substance-abuse line.

crisisLineSadagSmsName.desc: Name of the SADAG SMS (text) support line (South Africa).

crisisLineSadagSmsDesc.desc: One-line description of the SADAG SMS support line.

crisisLineAaSaName.desc: Name of the Alcoholics Anonymous helpline for South Africa.

crisisLineAaSaDesc.desc: One-line description of the AA South Africa helpline.

crisisLineLifelineSaName.desc: Name of the 'Lifeline South Africa' crisis counselling service.

crisisLineLifelineSaDesc.desc: One-line description of the Lifeline South Africa service.

crisisLineFamsaName.desc: Name of the South African FAMSA helpline. FAMSA is a proper-name acronym; keep it.

crisisLineFamsaDesc.en: Family and Marriage Society of SA
crisisLineFamsaDesc.desc: Full name of FAMSA, shown as its line description.

crisisLineSancaName.desc: Name of the South African SANCA helpline. SANCA is a proper-name acronym; keep it.

crisisLineSancaDesc.desc: Full name of SANCA, shown as its line description.

crisisLineAaAustraliaName.desc: Name of the Alcoholics Anonymous helpline for Australia.

crisisLineAaAustraliaDesc.desc: One-line description of the AA Australia helpline.

crisisLineBeyondBlueName.desc: Name of the Australian 'Beyond Blue' mental health service. Proper name; keep it.

crisisLineBeyondBlueDesc.desc: One-line description of the Beyond Blue service.

crisisLineLifelineAuName.desc: Name of the 'Lifeline Australia' crisis support service.

crisisLineLifelineAuDesc.desc: One-line description of the Lifeline Australia service.

crisisLineTurningPointName.desc: Name of the Australian 'Turning Point' alcohol and drug treatment service. Proper name; keep it.

crisisLineTurningPointDesc.desc: One-line description of the Turning Point service.

crisisLineSmartAuName.desc: Name of the SMART Recovery service for Australia (AU). SMART Recovery is a proper name; keep it.

crisisLineSmartAuDesc.desc: One-line description of the SMART Recovery AU service.

crisisLineCrisisServicesCanadaName.desc: Name of the 'Crisis Services Canada' national crisis line.

crisisLineCrisisServicesCanadaDesc.desc: One-line description of Crisis Services Canada.

crisisLineCamhName.desc: Name of the Canadian CAMH helpline. CAMH is a proper-name acronym; keep it.

crisisLineCamhDesc.en: Centre for Addiction and Mental Health
crisisLineCamhDesc.desc: Full name of CAMH, shown as its line description.

crisisLineAaCanadaName.desc: Name of the Alcoholics Anonymous helpline for Canada.

crisisLineAaCanadaDesc.desc: One-line description of the AA Canada helpline.

crisisLineConnexOntarioName.desc: Name of the Canadian 'ConnexOntario' helpline. Proper name; keep it.

crisisLineConnexOntarioDesc.desc: One-line description of the ConnexOntario helpline.

crisisLineAaNzName.desc: Name of the Alcoholics Anonymous helpline for New Zealand.

crisisLineAaNzDesc.desc: One-line description of the AA New Zealand helpline.

crisisLineLifelineNzName.desc: Name of the 'Lifeline NZ' crisis support service (New Zealand).

crisisLineLifelineNzDesc.desc: One-line description of the Lifeline NZ service.

crisisLineNeedToTalkName.desc: Name of the New Zealand 'Need to Talk' (1737) free call-or-text support line. Proper name; keep it.

crisisLineNeedToTalkDesc.desc: One-line description of the Need to Talk line.

crisisLineAlcoholDrugNzName.desc: Name of the New Zealand 'Alcohol Drug Helpline'.

crisisLineAlcoholDrugNzDesc.desc: One-line description of the New Zealand Alcohol Drug Helpline.

crisisLineGermanyDhsName.desc: Name of the German DHS helpline; format is 'Country — Organisation'. Keep the em dash and 'DHS' acronym.

crisisLineGermanyDhsDesc.desc: Full German-language name of DHS (German Centre for Addiction Issues), shown as its description. Keep as-is.

crisisLineFranceEcouteName.desc: Name of the French 'Ecoute Alcool' helpline; format is 'Country — Organisation'. Keep 'Ecoute Alcool'.

crisisLineFranceEcouteDesc.desc: One-line description of the France Ecoute Alcool helpline.

crisisLineNetherlandsJellinekName.desc: Name of the Dutch 'Jellinek' addiction service; format is 'Country — Organisation'. Keep 'Jellinek'.

crisisLineNetherlandsJellinekDesc.desc: One-line description of the Netherlands Jellinek service.

crisisLineSpainAaName.desc: Name of the Spanish Alcoholics Anonymous service; format is 'Country — Organisation'. Keep 'AA Espana'.

crisisLineSpainAaDesc.desc: One-line description of the AA Spain service.
